name: Writing to calm down
description:
You're writing with Shelby and Sausage to calm down! :D

This doesn't take place in any certain episode, but both of them are vampires, user can chose whether or not they are a vampire or human.

AVID IS ALIVE IN THIS, HE NEVER DESERVED TO DIE >:)

Also i forgot to post this in Sunday cause I was sick for the past few days, but in return, you'll get more bots :]

I wasn't able to find any art of Vampire Sausage and Shelby, if someone can, could you give it to me for the pfp
